recalls.Description: Little Cow Company is recalling its 9 oz candles packaged in glass jars due to potential fire, burn, and laceration risks. These candles feature a sticker on the front displaying the brand name 'Little Cow Co.' along with the description '100% natural soy wax candle, laced with organic butter.' Consumers should be aware that the glass jars can crack or break during use, leading to dangerous situations.
recalls.Title: Little Cow Company Recalls 9 oz Glass Jar Candles Due to Fire and Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach out to Little Cow Company via email at info@littlecowco.com or visit their website at https://littlecowco.com/pages/recall. Click on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page for detailed information.

Products.Name: Little Cow Co. 9 oz Glass Jar Candle

Images.Caption: Recalled Little Cow Co. 9 oz Candle in Glass Jar

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of glass jar breaking. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Little Cow Company LLC, of Portland, Oregon

Retailers.Name: Available at New Seasons Market and Town and Country stores across the nation from December 2025 to January 2026 for approximately $25.

Hazards.Name: Risk of fire, burns, and lacerations due to potential glass jar breakage

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled candles and contact Little Cow Company for a full refund. They will need to mark the jar with an 'X', trim the wicks, and email a photo of the modified jar and cut wicks.

recalls.metaDescription: Little Cow Company recalls 9 oz glass jar candles due to fire and burn hazards. Contact them for a refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description:
LuxJet is recalling its Submersible LED Lights due to a serious risk of injury or death from battery ingestion. These lights were sold in packs of 10, featuring color-changing capabilities, two remote controls, and a total of 20 preinstalled CR2450 lithium batteries in the lights, along with four CR2032 lithium batteries in the remotes. Each light measures approximately 3.5 cm in diameter.

The recall is prompted by the lights' failure to meet safety standards regarding consumer products containing coin batteries. The lithium coin batteries are easily accessible to children, posing a significant ingestion hazard. Ingesting these batteries can lead to severe injuries, internal chemical burns, or even fatalities.
recalls.Title: Recall of LuxJet Submersible LED Lights Due to Battery Ingestion Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to LuxJet via email at info@luxjet.com.cn.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from January 2022 through November 2025 for approximately $23.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Shimei Lighting Co., Ltd dba as Luxjet, of China

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard from accessible lithium coin batteries

Remedies.Name: Stop using the LED lights and contact LuxJet for disposal instructions and a full refund. Consumers must send a photo of the destroyed product to LuxJet at info@luxjet.com.cn. Follow local hazardous waste procedures for battery disposal.

recalls.metaDescription: LuxJet recalls Submersible LED Lights due to battery ingestion risks. Immediate action required for consumer safety.

recalls.Description: Kroger has issued a recall for their Halloween-themed Skeleton Wax Candle, which is a white candle housed in a black plastic bowl adorned with skeleton and pumpkin decorations. The product features a warning label with a misspelling that states: "WANING: PLASTIC CONTAINER AND ONAMENTS ARE FLAMMABLE". Additionally, it includes a red price sticker of $7 and a caution indicating that it is not suitable for children under 12 years old, with the model number D310800CN01.
recalls.Title: Kroger Recalls Halloween Skeleton Wax Candles Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers can reach The Kroger Co. at 800-576-4377 from 7 a.m. to Midnight ET on weekdays and 7 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. ET on weekends. For more information, leave a message at https://www.kroger.com/hc/help/contact-us/customer-comments or visit www.kroger.com/i/recall-alerts or click on "Recall Alerts" at the bottom of the Kroger homepage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Kroger stores nationwide, including Dillons, Fred Meyer, Fry's, Smith's, and King Soopers from September 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $7.

Importers.Name: Carole Accessories, Inc., of Los Angeles, California

Distributors.Name: The Kroger Co., of Cincinnati, Ohio

Hazards.Name: Flammable ornaments posing fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled candle and return it to any Kroger store for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Kroger recalls Halloween Skeleton Wax Candles due to fire hazards. Return for a full refund. Learn more about the recall here.

recalls.Description: DEMDACO is recalling its Maril-brand seasonal scented candles due to safety concerns. These candles, sold in 8-ounce glass jars, are available in multiple fragrances, each marked with the brand name 'MARIL' and the fragrance name on the bottom of the jar. The affected products include the Siberian Fir, Cinnamon + Cedar, and Pumpkin + Birch scented candles, along with their corresponding SKU numbers.
recalls.Title: DEMDACO Recalls Maril Seasonal Scented Candles Due to Fire and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled candles immediately and reach out to DEMDACO for a full refund. Contact them toll-free at 888-336-3226 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or via email at customercare@demdaco.com. More details can be found at www.demdaco.com/recall-information.

Products.Name: Maril Seasonal Scented Candle - Siberian Fir

Images.Caption: Recalled MARIL Scented Candle 8-ounce Siberian Fir (SKU number: 1008170071)
Recalled MARIL Scented Candle 8-ounce Cinnamon + Cedar (SKU number: 1008170072)
Recalled MARIL Scented Candle 8-ounce Pumpkin + Birch (SKU number: 1008170073)
Recalled MARIL Scented Tester Candle 8-ounce Siberian Fir (SKU number: 1008170074)
Recalled MARIL Scented Tester Candle 8-ounce Cinnamon + Cedar (SKU number: 1008170075)
Recalled MARIL Scented Tester Candle 8-ounce Pumpkin + Birch (SKU number: 1008170076)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the candle's glass breaking while in use. No injuries or property damage have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at various gift shops across the country, including Bachman's in Minneapolis, Flowers Around the Corner in Bowling Green, Coopers Uptown Store in Kenosha, Haws & Co. Floral and Gifts in Lehi, and Past and Presents in Lenexa, as well as online at www.demdaco.com from July 2024 to November 2024 for approximately $30.

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration and fire due to potential cracking or breaking of the candle's glass container while burning.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled candles and contact DEMDACO for a full refund, including a prepaid shipping label for returns. No proof of purchase is needed.

recalls.metaDescription: DEMDACO recalls Maril seasonal scented candles due to fire and laceration hazards. Stop using and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: Kohl's has announced a recall of the St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders, which are designed to resemble a Christmas tree made from plastic horseshoes and can hold six tea light candles. These holders feature a gold star on top and are adorned with green plastic garland and red berries at the base. Due to a potential fire hazard, consumers are advised to take immediate action.
recalls.Title: Kohl's Issues Recall for St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Kohl's at 855-564-5705 from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Saturday, or visit www.kohls.com/faq/article/1013?icid=ft-customer-recalls. You can also find more details by clicking on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the Kohl's homepage.

Products.Name: St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders

Images.Caption: Recalled St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of tea light candle holders catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Kohl's stores nationwide and online at www.kohls.com from September 2024 through April 2025 for approximately $25.

Importers.Name: Kohl's Inc., of Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazard from candle holder catching fire

Remedies.Name: Stop using the candle holders immediately and return them to any Kohl's store for a full refund via gift card or original payment method. A pre-paid shipping label will be provided for online purchases. Kohl's will reach out to all known customers.

recalls.metaDescription: Kohl's recalls St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders due to fire hazards. Immediate action required for refunds.

recalls.Description: APOTHEKE is recalling its 26 oz. Pumpkin Ginger 3-Wick Scented Candles due to safety concerns. These candles, which come in an amber glass container with gold lettering, can pose significant fire and burn hazards. The batch code for the affected candles is CB-240603, located on the label at the bottom of the container.
recalls.Title: APOTHEKE Recalls Pumpkin Ginger 3-Wick Scented Candles Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach out to APOTHEKE via email at recall@apothekeco.com or visit their website at https://apothekeco.com/pages/candlerecall. Search for 'Recall' on their site for further details.

Products.Name: Pumpkin Ginger 3-Wick Scented Candle
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 640 (In addition, about 11 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled APOTHEKE's Pumpkin Ginger 3-Wick Scented Candle

Injuries.Name: APOTHEKE has received six reports of the candle's flames burning too high; four resulting in minor property damage, including singed surfaces and one minor burn to a consumer's hand.

Retailers.Name: Available at Crate & Barrel stores across the country and online at crateandbarrel.com from June 2024 to January 2025, priced around $80.

Hazards.Name: Fire, burn, and laceration risks due to high flames and potential glass breakage.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the candles immediately and contact APOTHEKE for a full refund, either as store credit or a check. Crate & Barrel will directly reach out to all known buyers. Dispose of the candles after requesting a refund.

recalls.metaDescription: APOTHEKE recalls Pumpkin Ginger 3-Wick Candles due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: Target has issued a recall for the Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah due to a significant fire hazard. These menorahs, crafted from blue polymer resin, stand 6 inches tall and 13 inches long, designed to hold up to nine tapered candles in metal cups on the dinosaur's back. The model number "240-14-1380" can be found on the hang tag attached to the dinosaur's neck.
recalls.Title: Target Recalls Spritz™ Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Target at 800-440-0680 for in-store purchases or 800-591-3869 for online purchases, both available from 6 a.m. to 10 p.m. CT. More information can also be found at https://help.target.com/help/recalls or by visiting https://www.target.com/ and selecting "Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah

Images.Caption: Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah
Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah

Injuries.Name: Target has received 58 reports of the menorahs scorching, charring, melting or catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Target locations across the country and online at Target.com from October 2024 through January 2025 for approximately $15.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential burning or catching fire when used with lit candles

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the menorahs immediately and return them to any Target store for a full refund via Target gift card or original payment method. Alternatively, consumers can contact Target for a prepaid return label to send the menorah back by mail.

recalls.metaDescription: Target recalls Spritz™ Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs due to fire hazards. Return for a full refund. Learn more here.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to The Legendary 'VACATION' Black Label Scented Candles, which are packaged in a black glass container with off-white wax. These candles measure approximately 3.75 inches in diameter and 3.5 inches tall, weighing around one pound. A gold foil label on the candle identifies it as The Legendary 'VACATION' by Vacation.
recalls.Title: Recall of The Legendary 'VACATION' Black Label Scented Candles Due to Fire and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach out to Vacation Inc. via email at recall@vacation.inc or visit www.vacation.inc/candlerecall. Additional details can be found by navigating to the 'Recalls' section on their website.

Products.Name: The Legendary 'VACATION' Black Label Scented Candles

Images.Caption: Recalled “The Legendary ‘VACATION’” by Vacation® Black Label Scented Candles

Injuries.Name: The firm has received seven reports of high candle flames, some of which resulted in the glass container breaking. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at vacation.inc, Amazon, Ulta.com, and various beauty and fashion retailers nationwide from November 2023 until September 2024 for approximately $42.

Hazards.Name: Fire and laceration hazards due to high flames causing the glass to break.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the recalled candles immediately and contact Vacation Inc. for a refund of $42. Instructions for registration, including submitting a photo of the candle and disposal confirmation, are available at https://vacation.inc/candlerecall.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of The Legendary 'VACATION' Black Label Scented Candles due to fire and laceration hazards. Learn how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: Trader Joe's is recalling its Mango Tangerine Scented Candles, identified by SKU 56879. These candles feature white wax with a cotton wick, contained in a tin, and weigh approximately 5.7 ounces. The SKU can be found on the bottom of the tin. The recall is due to a potential fire hazard where the flame may extend from the wick to the wax, creating an unexpectedly large flame.
recalls.Title: Trader Joe's Recalls Mango Tangerine Scented Candles Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact Trader Joe's Company at 833-771-0299 from 6 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or visit https://www.traderjoes.com/home/contact-us/product-feedback for product feedback. Additional information can be found at https://www.traderjoes.com/home/announcements?category=recalls or on the Trader Joe's website under the "Announcements" section.

Images.Caption: Recalled Trader Joe's Mango Tangerine Scented Candle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 14 reports of incidents involving high flames with the recalled candles, including three reports of minor property damage and two reports of minor burns.

Retailers.Name: Available at Trader Joe's locations nationwide in June 2024 for approximately $4.

Distributors.Name: Trader Joe's Company, of Monrovia, California

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential for larger than expected flames

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled candles immediately and return them to any Trader Joe's store for a full cash refund of $4, or fill out the Product Feedback Form online at https://www.traderjoes.com/home/contact-us/product-feedback to receive a $4 Trader Joe's gift card by mail. Customers may be asked to provide a receipt or a photo of the candle.

recalls.metaDescription: Trader Joe's recalls Mango Tangerine Scented Candles due to a fire hazard. Stop using and return for a refund or gift card.

recalls.Description: Orly Corporation is recalling its lavender scented candles, which are housed in a round wooden bread bowl. These candles feature three wicks and weigh approximately 8 ounces, adorned with lavender strands on top. The product label includes the name "CBOCS Distribution, Inc." along with UPC 197712076826 and essential fire safety warnings.
recalls.Title: Orly Recalls Lavender Scented Candles in Wooden Bowls Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach Orly Corporation at 800-917-2573, via email at candlerecall@orly-corp.com, or visit https://www.orly-corp.com/cracker-barrel-candle-recall and www.orly-corp.com, then click on "Candle Recall."

Products.Name: Lavender Scented Candle in Wooden Bowl

Images.Caption: Recalled Lavender scented candle in a round wooden bread bowl
Label located on the underside of the recalled candle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received eight reports of flames reaching excessive heights, including three reports of minor burns.

Retailers.Name: Available at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store® locations from November 2023 through May 2024 for approximately $13.

Importers.Name: CBOCS Distribution Inc., of Lebanon, Tennessee

Hazards.Name: Excessive flame height can ignite the bowl, leading to fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled candle immediately and return it to any Cracker Barrel Old Country Store® for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Orly recalls lavender scented candles due to fire hazards. Stop using and return for a refund. Learn more about the recall.
